name: Baked Potato Soup (Hard Rock Cafe)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup diced green onions, white part only
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry bacon until crisp and chop the bacon, reserving drippings.
2. Cook onions in the remaining drippings over medium-high heat until transparent (about 3 minutes).
3. Add flour, stirring to prevent lumps. Cook for 3-5 minutes until the mixture just begins to run golden.
4. Gradually add chicken stock, whisking to prevent lumps, until the liquid thickens.
5. Reduce heat to simmer and add potatoes, cream, chopped bacon, parsley, garlic, basil, salt, red pepper sauce, and black pepper. Simmer for 10 minutes; do not allow to boil.
6. Add grated cheese and diced green onions (white part only). Heat until the cheese melts smoothly.
7. Garnish each serving as desired with additional chopped bacon, grated cheese, and chopped parsley.
